claim: UNESCO IOC reports that all Indian Ocean countries have tsunami-warning infrastructure but last-mile dissemination and community-preparedness gaps remain in over 60 percent of coastal districts.

source.title: IOC Tsunami Early Warning and Mitigation System Status Report 2024

method: Reviewed IOC status report on warning-system coverage, last-mile gaps, and preparedness indicators.
limitations: Warning-system coverage does not guarantee effective response.
